## [06:04 - 07:25]

Guru world this teaching world this information World this knowledge entrepreneurial world then you know there's a lot of ways to package up your expertise and If and if the book is the first thing you're doing It's probably not going to make you as much money as if you took that same Knowledge and you built it into a knowledge product if you built it into an online product if you turn into an online Training if you turn it into a live event if you turn it into a webinar if you did a seed launch with it You know money, you know books can build your business But you rarely very very very few people make a Substantial amount of money make a living wage just from publishing books, especially if it's just one book So if it's just money that you're after Out of this book and you think you're gonna make a lot of money from royalties a lot of money from selling the book Then there probably are better ways To do that with the same knowledge Okay, so that's just an overview of some possible goals. I'm sure I've left some off the list here You might have some goals that aren't on the list here But Yeah, there there there are some of the big ones and it's important that you know what your goals are Before you start your launch process
